FLOW.COMMENT: insertActive - insert a new record into the TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE and TFW_TRANS_STEPS tables

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_replaceActive - replace a record in the TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE to support one transaction being executed on multiple IS 's that are using different databases (distributed Fusion)

MAP.COMMENT: blank if null everything in jsonActive

Values.value: INSERT INTO TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE ( TRANSACTION_ID, TRANSACTION_START_UTC, STATUS, STATUS_MESSAGE, STATUS_DATE, KNOWN_USER_ID, KNOWN_PROTOCOL, KNOWN_SERVER_NAME, KNOWN_REMOTE_IP, KNOWN_REMOTE_PORT, KNOWN_LOCAL_IP, KNOWN_LOCAL_PORT, KNOWN_FOLDER, KNOWN_FILENAME, KNOWN_MIMETYPE, KNOWN_SENDER, KNOWN_RECEIVER, KNOWN_MESSAGE_TYPE, KNOWN_ENCODING, KNOWN_SUBJECT, KNOWN_ACCEPT_SERVICE, ACCEPT_DOCUMENT_SIZE, HASH1, SENDER_TP_ALIAS, SENDER_TP_NAME, SENDER_BUSINESS_NAME, SENDER_APP, SENDER_PROTOCOL, SENDER_DOC_FORMAT, RECEIVER_TP_ALIAS, RECEIVER_TP_NAME, RECEIVER_BUSINESS_NAME,RECEIVER_APP, RECEIVER_PROTOCOL, RECEIVER_DOC_FORMAT, DOC_SUBTYPE, DOC_TYPE, BULK_DOC_COUNT, WORKFLOW_NAME, DOCUMENT_ID, MESSAGE_ID, ORDER_NUM, OTHER_NUM1, OTHER_NUM2, OTHER_NUM3, OTHER_NUM4, RULENUM, DELIVER_DOCUMENT_SIZE, WORKFLOW_STEPS, CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP, DELIVERY_ATTEMPTS, TRANSACTION_VARS, SEC_ACCEPT,SEC_DISCERN,SEC_BROKER,SEC_MAP,SEC_QUEUED,SEC_SLEEP,SEC_DELIVER,SEC_DB,SEC_IDLE,SEC_TOTAL, REMEDIATION ) VALUES ( '%sFwTransactionid%', TO_TIMESTAMP('%docActive/TRANSACTION_START_UTC%','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF'), '%sStatus%', '%sStatusMessage%',to_char(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZR'), '%docActive/KNOWN_USER_ID%','%docActive/KNOWN_PROTOCOL%','%docActive/KNOWN_SERVER_NAME%', '%docActive/KNOWN_REMOTE_IP%','%docActive/KNOWN_REMOTE_PORT%','%docActive/KNOWN_LOCAL_IP%','%docActive/KNOWN_LOCAL_PORT%', '%docActive/KNOWN_FOLDER%','%docActive/KNOWN_FILENAME%','%docActive/KNOWN_MIMETYPE%', '%docActive/KNOWN_SENDER%','%docActive/KNOWN_RECEIVER%','%docActive/KNOWN_MESSAGE_TYPE%', '%docActive/KNOWN_ENCODING%', '%docActive/KNOWN_SUBJECT%', '%docActive/KNOWN_ACCEPT_SERVICE%', '%docActive/ACCEPT_DOCUMENT_SIZE%','%docActive/HASH1%', '%docActive/SENDER_TP_ALIAS%','%docActive/SENDER_TP_NAME%','%docActive/SENDER_BUSINESS_NAME%','%docActive/SENDER_APP%','%docActive/SENDER_PROTOCOL%','%docActive/SENDER_DOC_FORMAT%', '%docActive/RECEIVER_TP_ALIAS%','%docActive/RECEIVER_TP_NAME%','%docActive/RECEIVER_BUSINESS_NAME%','%docActive/RECEIVER_APP%','%docActive/RECEIVER_PROTOCOL%','%docActive/RECEIVER_DOC_FORMAT%', '%docActive/DOC_SUBTYPE%','%docActive/DOC_TYPE%','%docActive/BULK_DOC_COUNT%', '%docActive/WORKFLOW_NAME%', '%docActive/DOCUMENT_ID%','%docActive/MESSAGE_ID%','%docActive/ORDER_NUM%','%docActive/OTHER_NUM1%','%docActive/OTHER_NUM2%','%docActive/OTHER_NUM3%','%docActive/OTHER_NUM4%', '%docActive/RULENUM%', '%docActive/DELIVER_DOCUMENT_SIZE%', '','%docActive/CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP%', '%docActive/DELIVERY_ATTEMPTS%','%docActive/TRANSACTION_VARS%', '%docActive/SEC_ACCEPT%','%docActive/SEC_DISCERN%','%docActive/SEC_BROKER%','%docActive/SEC_MAP%','%docActive/SEC_QUEUED%','%docActive/SEC_SLEEP%','%docActive/SEC_DELIVER%','%docActive/SEC_DB%','%docActive/SEC_IDLE%','%docActive/SEC_TOTAL%', '%docActive/REMEDIATION%' )

INSERT INTO TFW_TRANS_STEPS ( TRANSACTION_ID, SEQUENCE_NUMBER, INSTANCE_SPEC, THREAD_ID, STEP_DATE, STEP_NAME, STEP_STATUS, STEP_MESSAGE ) VALUES ( '%sFwTransactionid%', TRANSACTION_STEPS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, '%instanceSpec%', '%sTid%', to_char(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZR'), '%docActive/CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP%', '%sStatus%', '%sStatusMessage%' )

INVOKE.COMMENT: transaction %sFwTransactionid% %sRows% records inserted into the steps table

Values.value: transaction %sFwTransactionid% %sRows% records inserted into the steps table
